allow: PowerShell($body = '{"contents":[{"parts":[{"text":"say hi"}]}]}'; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1/models/gemini-2.0-flash:generateContent?key=AIzaSyDGtWmglDKBwGLOmJC9Xs48ide_vDE6yFg" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 } catch { $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\)\); $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) })
